message:
test(resize): expand resize_scheduler from 30 to 59 tests covering config, lifecycle, and scheduling edge cases (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 29 new tests: config defaults/serde, work class priority, domain
key/serde, intent normalization, metrics/result defaults, empty-frame
scheduling, multi-pane budget fit, oversubscription toggle, lifecycle
phase edge cases (wrong seq, nonexistent pane), aging credit accumulation
and capping, lifecycle event limits, snapshot ordering, pending/active
totals, gate state, stalled transaction threshold, execution phase mapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
